addDrive.title: Add Drive
addDrive.description: Enter your Cloudreve site URL to connect
addDrive.waitingDescription: Complete the sign-in process in your browser to connect your drive.
addDrive.finalSetupDescription: Choose a local folder where your cloud drive will be mounted.
addDrive.folderNotEmpty: The selected folder is not empty. Please choose an empty folder.
addDrive.reauthorizeDescription: Click confirm to update your credentials for this drive.

errors.versionTooLow: Server version {{version}} is below minimum required {{minVersion}}
errors.stateMismatch: Authentication failed: state mismatch. Please try again.
errors.userIdMismatch: The account used for reauthorization does not match the original drive owner. Please sign in with the same account.

popup.upToDate: Your files are up to date.
popup.offline: Offline — pending changes will sync when reconnected

settings.title: Settings
settings.profileNoDrive: No drives configured. Add a drive to view your profile.
settings.noDrives: No drives configured. Add a drive to get started.
settings.autoStartDescription: Automatically start when you log in to your computer
settings.fastPopupLaunchDescription: Keep the popup window in memory for faster opening
settings.languageDescription: Select the display language for the application
settings.notifyCredentialExpiredDescription: Show notification when drive credentials expire
settings.notifyFileConflictDescription: Show notification when file conflicts occur
settings.logToFileDescription: Save logs to file for debugging (restart required)
settings.logLevelDescription: Set the verbosity of log output (restart required)
settings.logMaxFilesDescription: Number of log files to keep (restart required)
settings.deleteDriveConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
settings.ignorePatternsDescription: Enter gitignore-style patterns, one per line. Matching files will not be synced.
settings.maxFileSizeDescription: 0 = unlimited. Files larger than this will not be synced.
settings.heartbeatIntervalDescription: How often to check server connectivity (seconds)
settings.checkUpdatesOnStartupDescription: Automatically check for new versions when the app starts
settings.autoInstallUpdatesDescription: Download and install updates automatically without prompting
